⚠ Solicitor risk thread: Solicitors appear in 48 entity entries — 2 convictions, 2 charged/pending, 12 Not Finalized. Recurring failure modes: sham property transactions, missing source-of-funds CDD, dual buyer/seller conflicts. Key cases: Jirehouse, Cuthbert & Co, K and K Solicitors, Nyamaah v Solidum. Primary hooks: s328 (arrangements), s330 (failure to disclose).
